epigraph.quote: all we had was mown grass & owls

per_stop.quote: Sensible people fell into bed + Charles + Jenny + John went off to the pub.
Tinder had a wild run around with Conta's dogs. Iona wonders if he could breed with Willow.
You could view the land for miles around at the top of the house, cupola balcony.
There was a trailer serving grilled food, so we had chips with our chicken salad.
The new visitors' centre, opened in the last 12 months, is very good. Light + airy.
The village has huge water meadows, which used to be flooded every winter to keep them fertile.
As dusk fell there was a raucous noise from the oak tree next to us. Screeching, murder, mayhem.
She watches the TV, Wimbledon, from behind a silk parasol because of the sun's glare.
